title: rubus × fultiformis
intro: Rubus × fultiformis, a hybrid of the blackberry and raspberry, is a thorny shrub native to certain regions of North America. The leaves, roots, and fruits of Rubus × fultiformis have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × fultiformis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues and promote overall well-being.
